hero.subtitle: Golf entertainment + delicious food. Perfect for groups of 5 people.

packages.simulatorUsage: Golf simulator usage ({hours, plural, =1 {# hour} other {# hours}})

about.heading: About Our Play & Food Packages
about.paragraph1: Experience the ultimate golf entertainment with our all-in-one packages that combine golf simulation with delicious food and drinks!
about.paragraph2: Each package is designed for groups of up to 5 people and includes everything you need for a perfect outing: golf simulator time, fresh food prepared in our kitchen, and beverages. You can enjoy these packages with fewer people too! No hidden costs, no surprises - just pure entertainment value.
about.paragraph3: Perfect for friend groups, family outings, celebrations, or team building events. No golf experience required - our friendly staff will help you get started!

info.heading: Perfect for Groups
info.body: All packages include golf simulation, food, and drinks for 5 people. No golf experience needed - our staff will help you get started!

hero.badge: For use in your LENGOLF bay
hero.subtitle: Free standard sets with every booking. Upgrade to Callaway Warbird, Majesty Shuttle, or Callaway Paradym for the ultimate simulator experience.
hero.imgFullSetAlt: Callaway Paradym full set in bag

courseBanner.heading: Rent Premium Clubs for Your Round
courseBanner.body: Warbird, Shuttle & Paradym sets · From ฿1,200/day · Delivery anywhere in Bangkok
courseBanner.bgAlt: Rent premium golf clubs for Bangkok golf courses

pricingTable.heading: Club Upgrade Pricing
pricingTable.footnote: Standard clubs are always free with any bay booking. In-bay use only.

sets.standardDescription: Men's & Ladies' sets included free with every bay booking
sets.handednessNote: All Premium and Premium+ sets shown are right-handed. Free standard left-handed clubs are available with every bay booking, and we keep one left-handed Premium rental set available on request — contact us on LINE @lengolf to reserve.

why.heading: Why Choose LENGOLF Golf Club Rental?
why.feature1Body: Our rental clubs are high-quality models from top brands like Callaway and Majesty. All clubs are professionally maintained and cleaned after each use.
why.feature2Body: Every bay booking includes complimentary standard clubs at no extra charge. Upgrade to Premium or Premium+ anytime during your session.
why.feature3Body: Rent premium clubs by the hour — 1, 2, or 4-hour options available. No minimum commitment, just upgrade any bay session.
why.feature4Body: Select your preferred clubs when booking your simulator bay online. No deposits required, just show up and play!

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1Title: What's the difference between Standard, Premium, and Premium+?
faq.q1Body: Standard clubs are house sets included free with every booking. Premium sets feature Callaway Warbird (men's) and Majesty Shuttle (ladies') starting from ฿150/hr. Premium+ offers tour-level Callaway Paradym Forged Carbon clubs from ฿250/hr.
faq.q2Title: Can tourists rent golf clubs at LENGOLF?
faq.q2Body: Yes! Our golf club rental service is perfect for tourists visiting Bangkok. No membership required — just book online and enjoy premium clubs during your visit.
faq.q3Title: Do I need to reserve clubs in advance?
faq.q3Body: You can select your preferred clubs when booking your bay online, or simply request them when you arrive. Premium and Premium+ sets are subject to availability.
faq.q4Title: Can I use the rental clubs outside of LENGOLF?
faq.q4BodyBefore: The hourly rates on this page are for in-bay simulator use only. For taking clubs to a Bangkok golf course (daily rates from ฿1,200 with delivery available), see our
faq.q5Body: Yes — free standard left-handed clubs are included with any bay booking. We also have one left-handed Premium rental set available on request, charged at our regular Premium rates. The Premium+ Paradym is right-handed only. Message us on LINE @lengolf to reserve a left-handed Premium set in advance.

cta.heading: Ready to Play with Premium Clubs?
cta.body: Book your simulator session and upgrade to premium clubs at LENGOLF Bangkok.

site.title: LENGOLF - Indoor Golf Simulator in Bangkok | Book Your Bay
site.description: Experience Bangkok's premier indoor golf simulator at LENGOLF. Located at Mercury Ville @ BTS Chidlom. State-of-the-art Korean simulators, professional coaching, and great food & drinks. Book your bay now!
site.ogTitle: LENGOLF - Bangkok's Premier Indoor Golf Simulator Experience
site.ogDescription: Experience Bangkok's top-rated indoor golf simulator in the heart of the city! Located at Mercury Ville @ BTS Chidlom, LENGOLF offers state-of-the-art Korean simulators in a fun, relaxed environment. Perfect for all skill levels with great food & drinks. Book your bay now!
site.twitterDescription: Book your golf simulator bay at LENGOLF Bangkok. Perfect for practice, lessons, or fun with friends. Located at Mercury Ville @ BTS Chidlom.

playAndFood.title: Play & Food Packages - LENGOLF Golf Entertainment
playAndFood.description: Ultimate golf entertainment experience combining simulator play with delicious food. Starting from 240 THB per person. Perfect for groups and families.
playAndFood.ogDescription: Ultimate golf entertainment experience combining simulator play with delicious food. Starting from 240 THB per person.

golfClubRental.title: Golf Club Rental Bangkok | Premium Callaway Clubs | LENGOLF
golfClubRental.description: Rent premium golf clubs in Bangkok. 2024 Callaway Warbird & Majesty Shuttle sets available. Hourly & daily rates from ฿150. Book online at LENGOLF indoor golf simulator.
golfClubRental.ogTitle: Premium Golf Club Rental in Bangkok | LENGOLF
golfClubRental.ogDescription: Rent 2024 Callaway Warbird & premium golf clubs at LENGOLF Bangkok. Flexible hourly & daily rates. Perfect for tourists & locals. Book online now!
golfClubRental.twitterDescription: Rent premium 2024 golf clubs at LENGOLF. Callaway Warbird & Majesty Shuttle available. Book online!

courseRental.title: Golf Course Club Rental Bangkok | Premium Clubs Delivered | LENGOLF
courseRental.description: Rent premium golf clubs for Bangkok golf courses. Callaway Paradym, Warbird & Majesty Shuttle sets. Daily rates from ฿1,200. Delivery within Bangkok ฿500.
courseRental.ogTitle: Golf Course Club Rental in Bangkok | LENGOLF
courseRental.ogDescription: Rent premium golf clubs for Bangkok golf courses. Callaway Paradym & Warbird sets with delivery. Daily & multi-day rates.
